propositions: New local shell/session/worktree writes on this machine are attributed but unsigned because no persistent signing key is configured.
The Rebar Bot identity 594c already exists with one registered ed25519 key and resolves via git-email fallback, so it is confirmed not created.
Provision a machine-wide persistent signing key by materializing the SSM SecureString private key to a 0600 file outside the repo and setting [identity] signing_key in the XDG user config.
The user config signing_key wins over the project rebar.toml (which sets none), so every worktree signs with no per-session setup.
A fresh worktree write must carry a signature and verify, confirmed via a probe ticket absent from the non-verified report.
Enforcement flip of identity.require_authenticated is out of scope and would reject all local writes until every session signs.
